creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
This problem also occurs with japanese/xpdf.
3 years ago I heard that it is impossible to fix this :)
I think it needs to be patched enough to turn into something that is not a portmaster.

So my /etc/make.conf has the following written in it.

.if !empty(.CURDIR:tA:M/usr/ports/japanese/xpdf)
BUILD_DEPENDS=  ${ADOBECMAPDIR}/ai0/CMap/Identity-H:print/adobe-cmaps
.endif
